narrative:
Malvern (precinct in Carroll County) has 692 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
